detail.description:
Thrilling blade battles unfold right in your hands!Who will become the next Axis Master?!
Welcome to Axis-Blade, the next-gen 3D action epic RPG with PvP, 
stunning skill combos, and intense spinning clashes!

Axis-Blade fuses spin mechanics, arena battles, and deep customization in one epic strategy game.
🔥 Launch bonus available now—log in and claim your free gacha rewards!

▶ Real Time 3D Action Battles
Spin your Blade in 1v1 PvP and 3v3 team battles! 
Use real-time controls to unleash epic
